1844770.name: A Jornada de Vanildo Fan Pack
1844770.description:
Vanildo's Journey Fan Pack is an additional content pack that contains many graphics and audio features, made especially for fans of the game! The pack also contains additional information on the story and characters of Vanildo's Journey!

The Fan Pack is a way to collaborate with the developer, so whoever is satisfied with the game experience and wants to contribute with the creation of new stories can purchase the pack, being a way to maintain the price of the game accessible and sustainable.

Released initially in May 2022, the additional content pack has already received several updates, bringing new insights into the characters' stories and various elements of the game, along with videos and special exclusive content for those who have purchased the package!

Accessing the Fan Pack:
After purchasing and downloading the Vanildo's Journey Fan Pack, go into Vanildo's Journey Properties and find the "Browse Local Files" button. This will take you to the Vanildo's Journey game directory, which has the Fan Pack included in it.
After accessing the folder entitled "Vanildo's Journey Fan Pack", you will be able to view all the content of the DLC! It is highly recommended to read the "SPOILER ALERT" file.

We strongly recommend that you DO NOT view this pack if you haven't finished the main game yet, as it contains numerous spoilers that will surely harm your final experience.

It is recommended to view the contents of this pack only after completing the game!
1844770.supported_languages: 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 英语
